instruction: Someone repainted the small pink dot on the gif icon purple. Set it back to the original.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/gif.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12.75 8.25v7.5m6-7.5h-3V12m0 0v3.75m0-3.75H18M9.75 9.348c-1.03-1.464-2.698-1.464-3.728 0-1.03 1.465-1.03 3.84 0 5.304 1.03 1.464 2.699 1.464 3.728 0V12h-1.5M4.5 19.5h15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25V6.75A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 19.5 4.5h-15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25v10.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 4.5 19.5Z"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#a855f7" cx="112" cy="112" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
